overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing Geralt walking through diverse natural environments including grassy hillsides, a rocky coastal campsite with massive whale bone landmarks, and dense forest trails. The footage features overcast lighting, detailed vegetation, and cinematic game engine visuals with a cool, desaturated color palette.

scene_state.functional_zone: grassy hillside meadow with scattered pines

agents.ego_description: Geralt walking steadily uphill through tall grass and wildflowers on a forested hillside

entered.detail: tall green grass and white wildflowers covering the hillside
tall evergreen trees framing the left side of the meadow
misty mountain visible through the trees in the background

segments.scene_description: Geralt walks through a wide-open grassy hillside meadow with scattered pine trees. The terrain slopes gently upward with tall grass and wildflowers in the foreground and misty mountains visible in the distant background under overcast skies.

scene_state.functional_zone: rocky coastal campsite with red tent

events.description: transitioning from grassy hillside to rocky terrain with campsite

agents.ego_description: approaching a small campsite with a red tent and supply barrels

notable_agents.action: guard standing near the red tent, watching the approach

entered.detail: small red canvas tent with wooden poles at the campsite
stacked wooden supply barrels next to the tent
gravel and stone ground replacing the grassy meadow

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions to a rocky coastal campsite where a red tent and wooden barrels are set up on gravel terrain. A guard stands near the tent as Geralt approaches, and massive whale bones become visible in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: coastal whale graveyard with massive rib bones

events.description: turning toward the coast revealing enormous whale rib bones protruding from the ground

agents.ego_description: turning left toward the coastline and walking past massive curved whale bones

entered.detail: massive curved rib bones of a sea creature towering over the landscape
grey ocean visible beyond the rocky shore under cloudy skies
dark volcanic rocks and pebbles covering the coastal ground

segments.scene_description: Geralt turns toward the coast, revealing a dramatic landscape of massive whale rib bones towering over the rocky shore. The ocean stretches to the horizon on the left as he walks past the skeletal remains and the campsite recedes into the background.

scene_state.functional_zone: winding coastal dirt path between cliff and forest

agents.ego_description: walking along a narrow dirt path with the ocean cliff to the left and pine forest to the right

entered.detail: narrow winding dirt trail along the coastal edge
steep drop-off to the ocean visible on the left side of the path
dense pine trees lining the right side of the coastal path

segments.scene_description: The path becomes a narrow dirt trail winding along the coast with a steep cliff edge to the left overlooking the ocean and a pine forest to the right. The massive whale bones disappear behind as the trail continues through mixed terrain.

scene_state.functional_zone: dense upland forest trail with heavy canopy cover

events.description: entering darker forested area with dense canopy blocking the sky

agents.ego_description: walking uphill through a densely shaded forest path with tall pines surrounding the trail

entered.detail: thick overhead cover of pine branches blocking most of the sky
dense shrubs and ferns lining both sides of the narrow trail
tall straight pine tree trunks rising on both sides of the path

segments.scene_description: The trail enters a dense upland forest where the canopy blocks the sky, creating a darker, sheltered environment. Tall pine trunks and thick undergrowth line the narrow uphill path as the coastal views disappear completely behind the trees.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from an open, misty meadow into a rugged coastal landscape and finally into a dense, sheltered forest. It begins with Geralt walking through a wide-open grassy hillside dotted with pine trees and distant mountains under an overcast sky. As the terrain shifts, the camera moves toward a rocky coastal campsite featuring a red tent and wooden barrels, before expanding to reveal massive whale rib bones towering over the shoreline. The scene then follows a narrow dirt trail winding between a steep ocean cliff and a pine forest, leaving the skeletal remains behind. Finally, the path leads upward into a dense upland forest where the thick canopy blocks the sky and the coastal views disappear behind towering pine trunks and heavy undergrowth.
